visualization.name: RMSX Flipbook
visualization.description: Render RMSX Flipbook viewer manifests with bundled Molstar.
visualization.help:
# What is RMSX Flipbook?
RMSX Flipbook opens `rmsx.json` viewer manifests produced by RMSX/Flipbook workflows. It renders the embedded PDB time slices with bundled Molstar and colors residues by their RMSX values.
Use it from Galaxy's Visualize action on an `rmsx.json` dataset. The manifest must use schema version `flipbook-molstar-viewer/v1`; if required fields are missing, the viewer reports the validation problem before rendering.
